global.title: Buried in negative equity? These EV deals can help get you out of that gas guzzler
global.summary: The biggest obstacle to buying an EV isn’t always range anxiety, it’s the negative equity on their current car loan. If that’s you, don’t worry – these EVs have enough cash on the hood to help dig you out from under that gas guzzler.

global.title: Electric rally car revival continues with new, 280 hp Peugeot E-208 GTi
global.summary: Making its public debut at the legendary 24 Hours of LeMans this weekend, the new, 280 hp Peugeot E-208 GTi resurrects another storied hot hatch name as it takes its place alongside reborn 80s icons from Lancia and Renault.

global.title: Super-sized slot cars: these HD electric machines NEVER need plugged in
global.summary: A Kalmar Ottawa T2 EV electric terminal tractor has been successfully deployed on an in-road charging system in Ljungby, Sweden, enabling continuous operation without ever needing to be plugged in.

global.title: Dig it: mine goes 155 consecutive hours on 100% renewable energy
global.summary: Last month, the Bellevue Gold mine did something that was previously unthinkable. For over 155 consecutive hours – a full six-and-a-half day work week – the mine operated on 100% renewable energy. The future is now, kids: engines off!

global.title: This electric car company just produced its one millionth electric motorcycle
global.summary: When most people in North America or Europe hear the name VinFast, they probably think of the Vietnamese electric car company trying to break into international markets with a lineup of electric SUVs. What many don’t realize is that VinFast is already a giant in another corner of the EV industry: el

global.title: Shell could walk away from offshore wind in $1 billion+ sell-off
global.summary: Shell is planning to sell its offshore wind farm assets in a deal that could raise more than $1 billion, Bloomberg reports.

global.title: The Chevy Equinox EV is now way more expensive to lease, but the Bolt is a bit cheaper
global.summary: America’s most affordable EV offering over 315 miles of range, as GM calls it, just got significantly more expensive to lease this month.

global.title: Toyota opens orders for its first body-on-frame EV pickup, starting at under $60,000
global.summary: The Hilux BEV arrives as Toyota’s first fully electric pickup and body-on-frame EV.

global.title: Podcast: Rivian R2 first drive, BYD goes nuts on flash charging, Donut Lab’s miracle battery is dead, and more
global.summary: In the Electrek Podcast, we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week’s episode, we discuss our Rivian R2 first drive, BYD going nuts on flash charging, Donut Lab’s miracle battery being seemingly dead, and more.

global.title: BMW put the new iX3 through the paces, and it still drove 500 miles on a single charge
global.summary: BMW drove the new iX3 through heavy rain and snow on public roads, climbing over 6,500 feet up hills, and it still managed 500 miles without stopping to charge.
